business_ideas.idea: Build niche cable networks focused on single genre to compete with broadcast monopolies
Create reality TV concept where real people live together on camera without scripts
Develop music video channel as alternative to radio for promoting music and artists
Build children's network and content studio to compete with Disney in kid programming
Invest in emerging creative talent through festivals and direct partnerships
Create high-margin consumer products from TV IP including toys and feature films

predictions.text: Creator economy and Patreon model will replace cable network distribution for most creators
Direct-to-consumer platforms will drive more value than traditional media gatekeepers
Music videos will remain relevant cultural format despite MTV's shift away from them
